About

I'm the marketer who actually moves the needle

I'm a digital marketer who turns scroll-stopping content into engagement gold and yes, I have the analytics to prove it.

Armed with an MSc in Digital Marketing from Newcastle University and a track record of making algorithms work overtime, I specialise in social media strategy, SEO, and campaigns that actually convert.

When I'm not analysing metrics or debating the perfect posting time, I'm probably designing something in Canva, hunting for the next trending audio, or convincing brands that yes, they do need another Instagram Reel.
